playbook.intent: From signed SOW to client-accepted final deliverable, with the freelancer running solo across discovery, build, and ship — no scope creep, weekly invoices paid on time, written handover + warranty period defined.
playbook.scope: From signed SOW to client-accepted final deliverable, with the freelancer running solo across discovery, build, and ship — no scope creep, weekly invoices paid on time, written handover + warranty period defined.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Kickoff + stakeholder map
stage.intent: Set the working contract on day one.

tasks.task: Run a 60-minute kickoff with all stakeholders

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when stakeholder map is signed off.

stage.name: Discovery + requirements
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when client signs the requirements doc.

stage.name: Architecture + risks
stage.intent: Pick the tech path and name the risks.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when risks have named mitigations.

stage.name: Build sprints

tasks.task: Maintain CI/CD with health checks + logging
Update the traceability matrix per sprint

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every sprint ends with a working demo.

stage.name: Scope-creep firewall
stage.intent: Block creep before it ruins the project.

tasks.task: Either accept with a change order OR defer

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when no change is silently absorbed.

stage.name: Weekly invoicing + cashflow
stage.intent: Money lands on time, every week.

tasks.task: Send invoices on the agreed cadence

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when no invoice is overdue by >7 days.

stage.name: UAT + acceptance

tasks.task: Run UAT sessions with the client
Resolve UAT findings in priority order

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with written client acceptance.

stage.name: Handover pack
stage.intent: Leave behind a project that runs without you.

tasks.task: Compile the handover package (docs, runbooks, credentials)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when client team can operate without you.

stage.name: Testimonial + referral ask
stage.intent: Convert delivery into the next pipeline.

tasks.task: Ask for a referral to 2 similar buyers

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when testimonial + referrals are committed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content project-kickoff-to-handover-typical-6-12-week-engagement --format md, agent: faion get-content project-kickoff-to-handover-typical-6-12-week-engagement --format context, json: faion get-content project-kickoff-to-handover-typical-6-12-week-engagement --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
